A - Product

Time Limit: 2 sec / Memory Limit: 256 MiB

Score: 100 points

Problem Statement

Given A and B, determine whether \(A \times B\) is even or odd.

Constraints

  • \(1 \le A,B \le 10^4\)
  • All values in input are integers.

Input

Input is given from Standard Input in the following format:

A B

Output

Print Even or Odd.

Sample Input 1

3 4

Sample Output 1

Even

\(3 \times 4 = 12\), so print Even.
